Key Geographic Regions: Sub-Saharan Africa, South/Southeast Asia, Latin America

Primary Mosquito Vector (Breed): Aedes aegypti, Haemagogus janthinomys, Sabethes chloropterus
Culex pipiens, Culex quinquefasciatus, Culex tarsalis
Key Geographic Regions: North America, Europe, Africa, Middle East, West Asia
Vector Behavior & Habitat: Dusk-to-dawn biting; breeds in highly organic or polluted water (sewers, ditches)

Primary Mosquito Vector (Breed): Culex quinquefasciatus, Anopheles gambiae, Aedes polynesiensis
Key Geographic Regions: Sub-Saharan Africa, South/Southeast Asia, Pacific Islands
Vector Behavior & Habitat: Night-biting (Culex/Anopheles) or Day-biting (Aedes); tropical urban/rural zones
